candidate.objective: Experienced Supervisor, Poly Welder, and All Rounder with a strong background in HDPE pipeline installation and fabrication, dewatering infrastructure, and civil works supervision. Proven track record across mining and civil resource projects in Western Australia with employers including ACM Resources, Mount Gibson Iron, Blue Energy, and Plumbers Industry. Holds Section 44 — Appointed Persons, Cert III in Process Manufacturing, butt weld and electrofusion welding competencies, and a range of safety and plant tickets. Rio Tinto site inducted. Committed to delivering safe, efficient, and high-quality outcomes on every project.

duties: Supervision of HDPE pipeline installation and fabrication activities.
Hands-on installation and fabrication of HDPE pipelines.
Supervision of civil works associated with HDPE pipeline installation.
Installation and maintenance of dewatering infrastructure.
Operation of loader and other small mobile equipment in support of dewatering infrastructure installation.
Supervision of HDPE pipeline installation and fabrication.
Installation and maintenance of dewatering infrastructure.
Operation of plant and equipment associated with HDPE pipeline installation and dewatering.
Supervision of HDPE pipeline installation and fabrication.
Supervision of civil works associated with HDPE pipeline installation.

skills.detail: Supervision, installation, and fabrication of HDPE pipelines across civil and mining project sites.
Butt welding (PMBWELD301B) and electrofusion welding (PMBWELD302B) of HDPE pipelines.
Installation, maintenance, and supervision of dewatering infrastructure across mine sites.
Front Loader (RIIMPO321F), Haul Truck (RIIMPO337E), Skid Steer (RIIMPO318F), Backhoe (RIIMPO319E), Excavator (RIIMPO320F).
Section 44 Appointed Persons certificate; experienced in leading and supervising crews on civil and mining sites.

certifications.details: Section 44 Appointed Persons certification for supervision of civil works.
Supervise on-site operations in the resources and infrastructure sectors.
Communicate information in the resources and infrastructure industries.
Licence to operate front end loader.
Licence to operate skid steer loader.
Confined space entry and rescue competency.

referees: Professional references available upon request. Please contact ACM Resources to facilitate introduction.
